finding: Discordant Estimated Date of Confinement (EDC) by LMP and BPD

differentials.name: Methodological error in measurement
differentials.raw: Methodological error in measurement (a)  wrong axial section (b)  cranial compression (multiple gestation, breech presentation, oligohydramnios, dolichocephaly)

differentials.name: Erroneous LMP other measurements (AC, FL) correlate with BPD
differentials.raw: Erroneous LMP other measurements (AC, FL) correlate with BPD

differentials.name: Abnormal head growth (a)  BPD < AC: microcephaly, fetal macrosomia (b)  BPD > AC: intracranial abnormality, asymmetric IUGR
differentials.raw: Abnormal head growth (a)  BPD < AC: microcephaly, fetal macrosomia (b)  BPD > AC: intracranial abnormality, asymmetric IUGR

differentials.name: Used if ratio of BPD/OFD outside 0.70-0.86
differentials.raw: Used if ratio of BPD/OFD outside 0.70-0.86

context: Cephalic Index (CI) =  BPD / OFD; measurements of BPD and occipitofrontal diameter (OFD) both from outer to outer edge of calvarium ◊  Confirms appropriate use of BPD if ratio is between 0.70 and 0.86 (2 SD) Corrected BPD (cBPD) =  BPD and OFD are used to adjust for variations in head shape cBPD = √ BPD x OFD ÷ 1.26 = ([BPD + OFD] x 1.62) x 3.1417 Accuracy:  slightly less than for BPD HC too large:   hydrocephalus, hydranencephalus, intracranial hemorrhage, short limb dystrophies, tumor HC too small:   anencephaly, cerebral infarction, synostosis, microcephaly vera Abdominal Circumference (AC)
